sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 22:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 22:1
items.html: The illumination of Hochma is called “the opening of the Einayim” because Einayim [eyes] are Hochma. (Part 6, Item 51)
